description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, likely white or light gray, and large windows are distributed across the facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The house is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn with several mature trees, and a paved walkway leads to the main entrance. The front facade features a prominent entryway and a set of wide windows, while the rear and side facades have additional windows and a secondary entrance. The roof is flat, with no visible overhangs or decorative elements, emphasizing the modern architectural style. The property is set on a rectangular plot with green landscaping and a driveway on one side.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a light exterior, surrounded by a landscaped lawn and mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide windows, and a paved walkway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting additional windows, a secondary entrance, and the driveway area.
description_view_2: Side view with a clear look at the flat roof, rear patio area, and more windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, side windows, and the overall rectangular shape of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped large windows on multiple facades
